top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Fall as Mideast Tensions Flare Anew, Oil Climbs
top_signals.summary: US stocks dropped before the bell on Monday as investors assessed tit-for-tat attacks between the US and Iran and conflicting information over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
top_signals.summary: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
top_signals.summary: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
